---
name: Documentation
about: Report missing or incorrect documentation
title: "[Docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Description
Describe the documentation issue or improvement.

## Location
Where is the documentation located?

- README
- API documentation
- Code comments
- Wiki
- Other

## Problem
Explain what is missing, unclear, or incorrect.

## Suggested Improvement
Describe how the documentation should be improved.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Examples provided (if needed)
- [ ] Markdown formatting correct
- [ ] Links verified

## Tasks

- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] Add examples
- [ ] Review for accuracy
